prompt:
High-energy color manga-style street racing illustration of a modified [CAR MODEL] in [PRIMARY COLOR] with [ACCENT COLOR], drifting at high speed through [SCENERY], captured from an extreme low angle, front three-quarter perspective, car dominating the frame
the vehicle is highly detailed with visible mechanical precision: wide tires, deep rims, brake discs, vents, body kit, sharp reflections defined by clean color blocks and ink lines motion is exaggerated with dense speed lines, tire smoke trails in soft grey tones, asphalt debris, skid marks, and warped perspective lines bending around the car environment features [ENVIRONMENT DETAILS], rendered with simplified color blocking, strong perspective, and layered depth reacting to the car’s movement rendering uses bold black ink contour lines, varied line weight, flat color fills with minimal gradients, subtle cel shading, no painterly blending, no photorealism lighting is stylized with sharp highlights and shadow shapes, using color contrast instead of realistic lighting composition is aggressive and diagonal, with strong forward momentum, visual tension, and cinematic framing.
